title: Smelt Netherite Scrap In To a Netherite Ingot
description: No longer wasting gold, just smelt your scrap in to a ingot!
body:
**Overview:**

**Transform your gameplay experience with the Netherite Scrap Smelting mod! Tired of the long grind to create Netherite ingots? This mod simplifies the process, allowing players to smelt Netherite scrap directly into Netherite ingots, streamlining your crafting journey in the Nether!**

![netherite ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2db54a0f088ef5c3e5e221657d1a231a8c59d4a6.png)

**Features:**

**Direct Smelting: Convert Netherite scrap into Netherite ingots using a furnace, blast furnace. 
Balanced Gameplay: This feature is balanced to maintain the challenge of progressing through the game while making your netherite gear more accessible.**



![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da3ee29f00cfe8332ed0ab100180b23cf416df96.png)

**This mod have been created with: intellij**
